description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a medium blue fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa consists of two main seating sections: a longer three-seat segment and a chaise lounge extension on the right side, forming a right-angle configuration. The seat and back cushions are uniform, flat, and appear to be attached, providing a streamlined look without visible tufting or decorative stitching. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, contributing to the sofa's geometric silhouette. The legs are short, block-shaped, and finished in a dark color, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with clean lines, attached cushions, and blocky armrests and legs. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three main seat cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, boxy armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with no visible cushions or armrest details.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the long segment of the sofa, the attached backrest, and the left armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and a continuous attached back cushion, forming an L-shaped sectional layout with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, equal in height to the backrest, with a flat profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-shaped legs in a dark finish, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, matching the armrest height, with no segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
